ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well. This is a heads‑up that the corporate VPN will undergo a scheduled maintenance window on **Thursday, 24th April 2026** from **02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST**.

During this period, all remote access to the corporate network will be unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly and avoid accessing any critical systems during the downtime.

If you have any questions or need assistance with VPN re‑authentication after the maintenance, feel free to reach out to the IT helpdesk at ithelp@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Anita Sharma
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Partner,

I am writing to you from QuickBooks Support regarding an outstanding invoice that has not yet been verified. The invoice **QB-INV-2026-045** was issued on **01/05/2026** and is now overdue.

To avoid any disruption to your QuickBooks Norton subscription, please review and confirm the invoice details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not act within the next 24 hours, your account will be suspended automatically. For your security, we have also attached a screenshot of the invoice for your records.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Rahul Gupta
QuickBooks Billing Team
support@quickbooks.com
